required_preferences.fact: Adheres to a strict nightly wind-down protocol prescribed by her doctor: takes insomnia medication, avoids herbal tea, screens, and reading after 8pm; instead uses blackout curtains and a white noise machine to support sleep hygiene regardless of deadlines

supersedes.fact: Sticks to a wind-down routine with herbal tea and reading on nights before deadlines; never watches screens after 9pm if insomnia threatens

required_preferences.fact: Coordinates evening plans separately with her sister via a shared calendar; schedules video check-ins with her partner to coordinate across locations—never relies on spontaneous texts or phone calls for evening planning during the fellowship months

supersedes.fact: Coordinates evening plans as a household (with her partner and sister) through a shared calendar—never double-books or schedules last-minute outings without group discussion

required_preferences.fact: Sets aside extended weeknight time for conversations and support with parents, even if it means reducing evening leisure activities or shifting game night schedules
Reviews client emails only at designated times—never responds immediately during work blocks
Attends local board game cafes every other Saturday—never spends weekends entirely at home
Avoids evening game nights and late outings, preferring quiet home routines after 8pm to prioritize rest and sleep hygiene

persona: A freelance consultant specializing in CRM solutions for small businesses
